findings.snippet: throw new Error("Phase <n> is not completed yet")
findings.description: When next-phase cannot advance, the error does not list remaining KPs or how to complete them.
findings.title: Phase gating error lacks actionable details
findings.suggested_issue: Include remaining KPs and their statuses; suggest next command to run.

findings.description: If agent generation fails, fallback plan uses example.com and generic criteria, which provides a poor learning experience.
findings.title: Fallback plan content is low quality (placeholder URLs)
findings.suggested_issue: Provide stack-appropriate defaults or require user confirmation before saving fallback plan.

findings.snippet: { code: 'LOCKED', message: 'Learn state is locked by another process' }
findings.description: When lock acquisition times out, CLI returns LOCKED but does not guide users on stale lock recovery.
findings.title: LOCKED error lacks remediation guidance
findings.suggested_issue: Add a user-facing hint (pid/age + suggested unlock steps) and/or auto stale-lock cleanup.

findings.description: learn:plan doc writes .workflow/learn/state.json directly rather than using ccw learn:read-state / learn:update-state.
findings.title: learn:plan initializes state.json directly (bypasses CLI locking/validation)
findings.suggested_issue: Use CLI State API for initialization and updates so behavior is consistent and lock-protected.
